source: Corrected TASK-080 implementation build from validated planning build .codewiki/builds/planning/2026-05-16-domain-led-layering-refactor-roadmap.json after fresh implementation worker produced code changes.

task.title: Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence
task.summary: Strengthen validation gateway profiles so required audits, graph context, fresh isolation, and content proof are enforced by build kind and change class.

goal.outcome: Gateways block when required audit evidence, graph context, fresh isolation, or content-proof refs are missing for sensitive boundaries.
acceptance: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.
non_goals: Do not implement remote push/release automation.
Do not replace deterministic tests with non-deterministic validation.

exit_criteria: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by context.
Pass validation reports block when required audit evidence is missing.
Validation reports distinguish attestation metadata from content-proof refs.
Tests cover missing-audit/content-proof block and valid pass paths.

loop_start.reason: Implementation code changes were made by fresh spawned worker from task/build refs.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must independently check dirty worktree content and audit evidence policy.

next_loop.reason: Task closure requires commit/tree proof after implementation validation.

requirements.text: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by context.
evidence_mapping.evidence: src/application/builds.ts defines default required audits for feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication/publish/release/drift-audit/graph-audit and emits them into build policy and validation reports.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Missing required audit evidence blocks pass validation.
evidence_mapping.evidence: src/application/builds.ts computes audit evidence gaps and turns pass verdicts into block with failed_criteria=audit_evidence when refs/reports are missing; tests cover missing and present audit evidence paths.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Content-proof refs remain separate from validator attestation metadata.
evidence_mapping.evidence: src/application/builds.ts writes content_proof_refs from isolation proof fields and src/application/graph.ts indexes archive_ref/remote_ref as content proof; tests assert content_proof_refs for validated_sha.

agent_assessment: This build corrects the fresh worker's implementation build metadata to consume the current domain-led planning build. Source-owned audit engine remains TASK-079 work; TASK-080 enforcement currently accepts explicit audit_refs/audit_reports tokens/refs and will benefit from TASK-079 producing canonical audit report refs.
summary: TASK-080 gateway policy now declares required audit profiles, blocks pass validation reports without required audit evidence, and records audit/content-proof refs separately from validator attestation metadata.

evidence: tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs validation callers include audit refs for pass paths and assert content_proof_refs.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/builds.ts adds required audit profile declarations, audit ref/report inputs, audit evidence gap blocking, and content_proof_refs output.
src/application/graph.ts indexes isolation archive_ref/remote_ref as content proof.
src/domain/shared/types.ts and src/adapters/pi/schemas.ts expose audit input fields.
notes: Fresh worker made code changes and wrote .codewiki/builds/implementation/2026-05-16-task-080-gateway-audit-evidence-policy.json.
This build supersedes that worker build only to correct source_planning_build/current planning references.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs validation callers include audit refs for pass paths and assert content_proof_refs.
code_change_evidence: src/application/builds.ts adds required audit profile declarations, audit ref/report inputs, audit evidence gap blocking, and content_proof_refs output.
src/application/graph.ts indexes isolation archive_ref/remote_ref as content proof.
src/domain/shared/types.ts and src/adapters/pi/schemas.ts expose audit input fields.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: src/application/builds.ts default audit requirement map plus smoke assertions.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Existing isolation/content-proof enforcement remains; tests cover implementation dirty digest pass and task-close/publication immutable-proof requirements.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Validation reports now emit content_proof_refs separately and graph indexes additional proof refs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Targeted smoke tests cover missing audit evidence block and valid audit/content proof pass paths.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue from validated planning into TASK-080 gateway policy implementation.
implemented_changes: Declared required audit profile policy by validation context.
Blocked pass validation reports when required audit evidence refs are missing.
Emitted validation audit/content-proof fields separately from isolation attestation metadata.
Added smoke coverage for missing audit evidence and valid audit/content-proof pass paths.
acceptance_evidence: Required audit declarations emitted in build policy and validation reports.
Missing audit evidence blocks with failed_criteria=audit_evidence.
Valid implementation/task-close/publication reports pass/block according to content-proof policy.
non_goals_preserved: Did not implement /audit command or source-owned audit engine from TASK-079.
Did not close TASK-080 without task-close validation/commit proof.
remaining_risks: TASK-079 must supply canonical audit engine output for audit_refs/audit_reports.

risks: TASK-079 source-owned audit engine is still needed so audit_refs/audit_reports can cite canonical audit output rather than explicit profile tokens.
Task not closed; needs fresh implementation validation, commit, then task-close validation with immutable proof.

commit.title: feat(codewiki): enforce TASK-080 gateway audit evidence policy
commit.body:
TASK-080 gateway validation now declares required audit profiles, blocks pass reports without required audit evidence, and records audit/content-proof refs separately from validator attestation metadata.

Checks: npm run typecheck; node ./tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs && node ./tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs
Validation: <pending-validation>
